name: Kuroko Shirai
description:
__Height:__ 152 cm (5'0")
__Classification:__ Esper
__School:__ Tokiwadai Middle School
__Affiliation:__ Judgment
__Esper Power:__ Teleport
__Power Level:__ 4

Kuroko is [Mikoto](/character/13701/)'s kouhai in Tokiwadai Middle School and a protagonist in Toaru Kagaku no Railgun, as well as a supporting character in Toaru Majutsu no Index. A Level 4 Esper, she is a member of Judgment, a special public committee group whose duty is to maintain peace and order in Academy City. She has an unhealthy obsession with Mikoto, whom she calls "Onee-sama" (big sister), and is on the constant lookout for a chance to get physically intimate with her (and getting called a pervert in the process). 

Her power is instant teleportation, which allows her to teleport herself and anything she touches as long it weighs under around 130-137 kilograms to anywhere in a radius of around 81-85 meters.
